migrations.source_query: select NEWID() as Id, b.Id as InsuredId, c.Id as InsuredMarketingPreferenceId, 0 as IsSent, a.data as DocumentData, a.midterm_review_year as Tag, GETDATE() as CreatedDate, GETDATE() as UpdatedDate from edw_integration.customer_midterm_review_eligibility_feed a, edw_stage.Insured b, edw_stage.InsuredMarketingPreference c where a.customer_id = b.ReferenceCode and b.Id = c.InsuredId and a.midterm_review_completed_dt = cast(GETDATE() as date) order by 1

select b.ReferenceCode, JSON_VALUE(a.[data],'$.current_coverage.account_primary_image') as PrimaryAccountId from edw_integration.customer_midterm_review_eligibility_feed a, edw_stage.Insured b where a.customer_id = b.ReferenceCode and a.midterm_review_completed_dt = cast(GETDATE() as date)
migrations.update_template: UPDATE imp SET imp.PrimaryAccountId = '{PrimaryAccountId}' FROM dbo.InsuredMarketingPreference imp INNER JOIN dbo.Insured i ON i.Id = imp.InsuredId WHERE i.ReferenceCode = '{ReferenceCode}' AND imp.product = 'Risk Review' AND imp.Description = 'Mid-term Risk Review'
